title: Monarch Thronet Chair - White Vinyl/Gold Frame
features: They say "don't judge a book by its cover", but with the Monarch Throne Chair, you can bet you're getting the supreme seating choice for your next event or party.

While you might not want this in your home kitchen, the Monarch Throne Chair is a great option for any venue that regularly hosts bachelorette parties, weddings, baby showers or bat mitzvahs - really any function where somebody deserves to be the star of the show.
The commercial-grade mahogany wood frame is handcrafted and features conveniently placed arm rests on each side.
The vinyl padded cushion and backrest provide more than enough comfort and the ivory colored cushions give it a nice, clean finishing touch that's fit for a king or queen

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
